text.title: C4 Model for Architecture Visualization Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the c4-model methodology end-to-end.

step.name: lock-toolchain
step.action: Pick one of Structurizr / Mermaid / PlantUML; record in ADR.
step.decision-gate: If team cannot agree, default to Mermaid (lowest tooling cost).

step.name: draw-l1
step.action: Draw Context: system as a black box, actors and external systems around it, labelled relationships.

step.name: draw-l2
step.action: Draw Containers: deployable units inside the system + their tech stack + relationships including external dependencies.

step.name: draw-l3
step.action: Per significant container, draw Components: major modules + their interactions.
step.decision-gate: If a container has fewer than 4 components, skip L3 — overhead exceeds value.

step.name: wire-sync-policy
step.action: Add CI lint comparing L2 containers to the deploy manifest; block merges on mismatch.
